'''Morg Nar''' was a [[Houk/Legends|Houk]] strongbeing employed by the [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Wonn Ionstrike/Legends|Wonn Ionstrike]].
